purpose: Scoring rubric the guardian applies to a router run before calling it done.

router_criteria.criterion: Resolved topic is in the fixed enum and exactly one playbook was read
Single Alfa tag family throughout; no mixed families
No [CÓDIGO] tag without an inspected in-repo referent (else downgraded to [SUPUESTO])
depth honored: deep verified each step, quick stayed at essentials
Offline determinism: no network, wall-clock, or RNG in validated checks
A passing offline check is reported as well-formedness, never as a safety/correctness guarantee

topic_gate_pointers.ai-testing-strategy: all 36 matrix cells carry a verdict; aggregate-pass but slice-fail fails the gate
topic_gate_pointers.ai-assisted-testing: every test has target/rationale/oracle/evidence; status in {proposed,generated,executed}
topic_gate_pointers.ai-code-review: every finding cites file+line; no pass/fail claim without an executed command; gapless IDs
topic_gate_pointers.code-review: decision equals worst severity present; style-only is never a blocker without a cited policy
topic_gate_pointers.llm-evaluation: every score has a baseline; eval set+model+prompt versioned; judge config disclosed
topic_gate_pointers.ai-safety: every risk maps to >=1 control; no critical risk on allow-only; no orphan ids
topic_gate_pointers.ai-content-detection: authorship_claim stays not-determined; >=2 concordant signals before a non-inconclusive label
topic_gate_pointers.ai-documentation: every section cites >=1 evidence id; unverified content tagged [OPEN]; safe relative paths
topic_gate_pointers.ai-workflow-automation: gates precede external effects; bounded retries+fallback; input/output contracts per AI step

anti_patterns_that_force_block: answering from the router without reading a playbook
guessing an ambiguous topic instead of disambiguating or asking
claiming a test/runtime result with no executed command
reporting green as a safety guarantee
